enabled_checks.description: Enforce the ADR 0163 through ADR 0168 agent handoff, ADR index, and workstream registration standards.
Regenerate SLO and HTTPS/TLS Prometheus rules and enforce severity plus runbook annotations on committed alert rules.
Run the repo-managed ansible-lint policy against playbooks and the packaged collection.
Syntax check every tracked playbook outside the shared playbook task includes.
Scan published receipts and generated publication artifacts for secrets with the repo-managed gitleaks rules.
Reject reusable platform modules that import outward into scripts/ composition roots or dynamically load script-only helpers.
Validate the service dependency graph schema, cross references, generated Mermaid markdown, and generated Excalidraw architecture scenes.
Verify that the generated ADR index is current for documentation and workstream changes.
Regenerate the canonical generated documentation surfaces and fail if committed status docs drift.
Regenerate the portal build outputs and fail if committed publication artifacts drift.
Run the ADR 0111 non-destructive integration suite against staging if active, or record a repo-managed skip if no integration target is currently available.
Validate all Packer templates when the repo carries them; otherwise report a no-op pass.
Run the ADR 0230 shared OPA and Conftest policy checks against command approval, promotion eligibility, runner admission, and service-boundary invariants.

Validate canonical repository data models, provider-boundary anti-corruption guards, capability-contract catalogs, the committed platform manifest artifact, operator roster schema, cross references, and receipt schemas.
Run the repository filesystem through the pinned Trivy security scan policy.
Enforce the ADR 0107 extension checklist for non-grandfathered services.
Validate OpenTofu configuration if the repo carries a tofu root; otherwise report a no-op pass.
Type check the gate orchestration code and the manifest-backed Docker runner surfaces.
Validate the current branch against its declared workstream ownership manifest and shared-surface contract.
Run full-repository yamllint across tracked YAML files.

commands.command: ./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-vars role-argument-specs json alert-rules generated-docs generated-portals

checks.description: Run the worker-local validate_repo fallback when runner images are unavailable on the worker host.

capability_contract.description: Worker-side validation runner for the post-merge gate replay from the live mirrored checkout.
capability_contract.scratch_cleanup_guarantee: worker-local validation writes under the mirrored checkout and falls back to a bounded local subset when registry-backed runner pulls are unavailable

scratch_space.cleanup_guarantee: worker-local validation writes under the mirrored checkout and falls back to a bounded local subset when registry-backed runner pulls are unavailable
